name: Ondansetron
description: Ukukhetha i-5-HT3 receptor antagonist antiemetic. Isebenza kakhulu kwisicaphucaphu kunye nokuhlanza. I-ODT (ithebhulethi yokuchitha ngomlomo) iluncedo kwizicwangciso zentsimi xa i-IV ingafumaneki. Ifakwe kwezinye iipakethi zeepilisi zokulwa.
indications: Isicaphucaphu kunye nokugabha (ichemotherapy, i-opioid-induced, post-operative, enxulumene ne-TBI)
dose: I-4-8 mg IV / IO iqhube ngokukhawuleza ngaphezu kwe-2-5 min. I-ODT: 4-8 mg ichithwe phantsi kolwimi. IIM: 4 mg.
contraindications: I-hypersensitivity eyaziwayo kwi-ondansetron okanye abanye abachasi be-5-HT3
I-Congenital long QT syndrome (idosi ephezulu IV kuphela)
warnings: Idosi ephezulu ye-IV inokwandisa ixesha le-QT -- sebenzisa idosi esebenzayo ephantsi IV.
Ayithathi indawo yolawulo lwendlela yomoya kwisigulana esivalekileyo ngokugabha -- khusela indlela yomoya kuqala.

pediatric.dose: 0.1-0.15 mg / kg IV (max 4 mg). I-ODT: 4mg kubantwana> iminyaka emi-4.
pediatric.note: Isetyenziswe ngokubanzi kwaye inyamezeleke kakuhle kwi-pediatrics.

obstetric.note: Idatha encinci ekukhulelweni. Sebenzisa isicaphucaphu esiqatha/ukugabha emva kwekota yokuqala xa iinzuzo zodlula imingcipheko. Akukhuthazwa kwi-trimester yokuqala.
